summary: Batch 4 Student Experience Overhaul - All features fully working. Tested Steps 0-6: Legacy meet_link cleanup, Global Header, Dashboard Home, Booking Modal wizard, Wallet Digital Card, Schedule Calendar, Account Settings, Progress Tracker. All backend APIs pass (18/18 tests). All UI components render correctly with Apple-Islamic design standard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 4 Student Experience Overhaul complete. All student dashboard features tested: Dashboard Home (Smart Hero, Progress/Wallet/QuickBook widgets), Booking Modal (3-step wizard), Wallet Page (Digital Credit Card, Top Up modal with 3 packages, transaction history), Schedule Page (calendar with day selection), Account Page (profile form with timezone, password change), Progress Tracker (score cards), Global Header (notification bell, profile dropdown with My Profile/Settings/Support/Log Out). Mobile responsive - booking modal appears as bottom drawer. Stripe payments MOCKED.

features_tested.step_0_legacy_cleanup: PASS - Booking creation works without meet_link field
features_tested.step_1_global_header: PASS - Profile dropdown with My Profile, Settings, Support, Log Out options; Notification bell with unread badge and notification links
features_tested.step_2_dashboard_home: PASS - Smart Hero shows 'Book a Session' prompt; Progress/Wallet/QuickBook widgets render
features_tested.step_3_booking_modal: PASS - 3-step wizard (Configure → Select Teacher → Review); Duration selector (15/30/60 min); Date/Time pickers; Credit summary
features_tested.step_4_wallet_page: PASS - Digital Credit Card with balance/paid/bonus; Top Up modal with 3 packages (RM100/300/500); Transaction history with pagination
features_tested.step_5_schedule_page: PASS - Calendar renders with current month; Day selection; Upcoming/Completed legend
features_tested.step_6_account_page: PASS - Profile form (name/phone/timezone); Save button; Password change section
features_tested.progress_tracker: PASS - Score cards (Fluency/Tajweed/Makhraj); Recent Classes section
features_tested.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - Booking modal appears as bottom drawer on mobile; Bottom navigation bar visible

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: Stripe payment processing is MOCKED - modal shows 'Payment processing is currently in demo mode'
